title: Evok International Enterprises is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Evok International Enterprises is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Evok International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Evok International Enterprises:
Evok International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evok International Enterprises!
